meta.title: How to Create Full AI Animated Stories with Lip Sync - AI Animation Tutorial
meta.description:
Learn how to make ai animated stories in this ai animation tutorial
Tool I used 👉 http://openart.ai/home/?ref=animation

In this video I break down how to create your very own animated stories using AI. For this tutorial we will be using ChatGPT for the script, OpenArt for the visuals, videos & Lip Sync. Please let me know in the comments if you want an in depth tutorial about this. 


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
